title: Privacy Policy
intro: Buildographic ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share your personal information when you use our service. We are an India-based service and do not sell your personal data. If you do not agree with this Policy, please do not use our service.

blocks.text: We process personal data in line with applicable Indian law, including the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act) and rules issued thereunder, where they apply to our processing.

items: Account data: name, email address, and organisation name provided during registration. If you sign in with Google, we receive your name, email address, and profile picture from Google
Listing content: property descriptions, addresses, and images you provide when creating infographics
Payment-related information (payments are processed by PCI-DSS compliant processors; we do not store full card numbers on our servers)
Communication data: emails or support messages you send to us
Usage data: features used, pages visited, infographics generated, and timestamps of interactions
Device and browser data: IP address, browser type, operating system, and referring URLs, collected via server logs
Cookies and similar technologies (see our Cookie Policy)
Provide, maintain, and improve the Buildographic service
Process subscription payments and manage billing
Send transactional emails such as receipts and password reset links
Monitor usage against plan limits and prevent abuse
Comply with legal obligations and enforce our Terms of Service

blocks.text: We do not use your data for advertising purposes and do not sell your personal information to third parties.

Subscription payments are processed by RazorPay, a PCI-DSS compliant payment gateway. When you subscribe to a paid plan, your payment card details are entered directly into RazorPay's secure checkout. We do not store, see, or have access to your full card number, CVV, or banking credentials. We only receive a transaction reference, subscription status, and the last four digits of your card for display purposes.
RazorPay's privacy practices are governed by the RazorPay Privacy Policy (razorpay.com/privacy).

To generate infographics, listing text and images you provide are processed by our AI providers. These providers receive the content you submit solely to produce the requested visual output. We do not identify individual AI providers publicly as part of our model-opacity policy.
AI providers are contractually obligated to handle your data in accordance with applicable data protection laws and are not permitted to use your listing content to train their own models.
We do not sell your personal data. We share your information only with:

items: AI providers: to generate infographic output from your listing data
Cloud infrastructure providers: hosting and database services that store your account data and generated content
Analytics and monitoring tools: to detect errors and measure performance (data is anonymised or pseudonymised where possible)
Legal authorities: where required by law or court order

blocks.text: We are based in India. Some of our service providers, including certain AI providers and cloud infrastructure providers, may process data outside India. Where this occurs, we rely on those providers' contractual and technical safeguards to protect your information.

Your account data is stored on servers located in cloud data centres. We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest, access controls, and regular security reviews. No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure; we cannot guarantee absolute security.

We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, we will delete or anonymise your personal data within 30 days, except where we are required to retain it for legal or regulatory purposes (such as financial records, which are retained for the period required by Indian law).

You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data, and to raise a grievance about how we handle your data under the DPDP Act, where applicable. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@infographicai.in. We will respond to requests within 30 days and may need to verify your identity before fulfilling certain requests.
We use strictly necessary cookies and local storage tokens for authentication and session management. We do not use third-party advertising cookies. See our Cookie Policy for details.

Our website may link to third-party sites, such as our payment processor's checkout pages. We are not responsible for their privacy practices. Please read their policies before providing personal data.

The service is not directed to children under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us and we will take steps to delete it.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification at least 7 days before the change takes effect.
For questions, concerns, or grievances about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, contact us at privacy@infographicai.in.
